messages.content:
An example of cross-cultural barriers to communication is __.

Multiple choice question.

voice intonation


persuasion


active listening


media richness

Jargon creates barriers to communication:

Multiple choice question.

through feedback.


when the receivers do not possess the jargon codebook.


when the senders are creating new jargon. 


only when used face-to-face.
when the receivers do not possess the jargon codebook.

Deliberate gestures, such as shaking one's head: 

Multiple choice question.

differ in meaning depending on the national culture.


always add to understanding of the message.


never add to understanding the message.


have the same meaning in all cultures.
differ in meaning depending on the national culture.

__ is less likely to occur when corporate leaders create a "culture of candour."

Multiple choice question.

Jargon


Filtering


Nonverbal communication


Information overload

When the volume of information received exceeds the person's ability to process it 
 
 occurs

To get your message across to the other person, you first need to 
 with the receiver.

Cross-cultural differences that create barriers to communication include:

Multiple select question.

voice intonation.


conversational gaps and overlaps.


words that have different meanings across cultures.


substitutability.
conversational gaps and overlaps, words that have different meanings across cultures.

Which of the following is an example of a sender and receiver not having the same communication codebook?

Multiple select question.

Coming from cultures that assign different meanings for specific words and phrases


Relying on a digital communication channel when an in-person meeting would be more effective


Communicating in a language that neither has mastered


Using a communication channel that the sender or receiver are not skilled in using
Coming from cultures that assign different meanings for specific words and phrases, communicating in a language that neither has mastered

Nonverbal gestures differ from one culture to another.

True false question.
True
False
